commit_messages: [phase1] K5.1 + K4.1 + K8.1 + K7.1 + K6.1: hypothesis flag, min_games threshold, CompressibilityValidator, sanity validator, JSON schema. Test count: 8->15, all pass.
[plan] KALIBRACE_PLAN v2.3: pridan warning-devi-llm -- scope guard proti pretazeni MCP serveru epistemologii
[plan] KALIBRACE_PLAN v2.3: 3 operacni rezimy + Reality Calibration Loop + TOT stav + Konsolidacni protokol + Gated konsolidace
[plan] KALIBRACE_PLAN v2.2 + MIKOLOV_KOMPRESE: Kompresni validace patternu
[plan] KALIBRACE_PLAN v2.1: pridan autoruv filozoficky princip
[plan] Kalibracni plan pipeline: 7 kategorii chyb LLM -> 11 tasku (3 phase)
calibration_fixes: Pattern B: expanded from 'blunder' to 'blunder,mistake' to capture sub-300cp errors
Pattern G: bidirectional now detects whichever color has higher error rate (was white-only)
Pattern Q: bi-color logic (was only catching white wins)
Pattern P: replaced dead motif_type detection with tactical sequence criteria (captures+major pieces, eval>0)
Pattern R: new detector for endgame relaxation (eval_before>300, cp_loss>=300, phase=endgame)
pending_tasks: Run full pipeline to verify calibrated detectors return non-zero matches
Phase 2: FSRS integration + personal plan generation
session_progress: Kalibrace detectoru a pridani Pattern R dokonceno. 15 testu OK. Detektory nyni pokryvaji 7/9 definovanych patternu. Pripraveno na overovaci pipeline run.
